zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Melton Jr.於1640年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州易斯爾 本 懷特時，他的父親Thomas Berwick Melton Jr41歲，母親Hannah Wallingston40歲。他於1670年與Mary Ann Hopwood在美國維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪查爾斯 希迪結婚。他去世於1737年3月8日在美國維吉尼亞州素利素利享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Melton Jr.于1640年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州易斯爾 本 懷特时，他的父亲Thomas Berwick Melton Jr41岁，母亲Hannah Wallingston40岁。他于1670年与Mary Ann Hopwood在美国弗吉尼亚州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪查爾斯 希迪结婚。他去世于1737年3月8日在美国弗吉尼亚州素利素利享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: Melton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire, all of which have the same origin as Middleton , with Old English middel replaced by its Old Norse equivalent methal after the Scandinavian settlement of northern and eastern England.

variants.name: Middleton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called. In over thirty instances from many different areas, the name is from Old English midel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. However, Middleton on the Hill near Leominster in Herefordshire appears in Domesday Book as Miceltune, the first element clearly being Old English micel ‘large’, ‘great’ (see Middlebrook ). Middleton Baggot and Middleton Priors in Shropshire have early spellings that suggest gem̄thhyll (from gem̄th ‘confluence’ + hyll ‘hill’) + tūn as the origin. This surname is also found in Scotland and Ireland.

History: A Scottish family of this name derives it from lands at Middleto(u)n near Kincardine. The Scottish physician Peter Middleton practiced in New York City after 1752 and was one of the founders of the medical school at King's College (now Columbia University) in 1767. One of the earliest of the Charleston, SC, Middleton family of prominent legislators was Arthur Middleton, born in Charleston in 1681. The name has also been established in Ireland since at least the 13th century; its presence was reinforced by settlers in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Melton Jr. was born in 1640, in Isle of Wight, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas Berwick Melton Jr, was 41 and his mother, Hannah Wallingston, was 40. He married Mary Ann Hopwood in 1670, in Charles City, Charles City County, Virginia, United States. He died on 8 March 1737, in Surry, Surry, Virginia, United States, at the age of 97.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Melton Jr.が1640年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州イスル オフ ウィトで生まれた時，父Thomas Berwick Melton Jrは41歳，母Hannah Wallingstonは40歳であった。1670年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州チャーレス シトイ コウントイチャーレス シトイでMary Ann Hopwoodと結婚した。彼は1737年3月8日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州スリースリーで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Melton Jr.(이)가 1640년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 이슬일 프 와이트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Berwick Melton Jr(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Hannah Wallingston(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1670년 미국 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티 찰스 시티에서 Mary Ann Hopwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1737년 3월 8일 미국 버지니아 주 수리 수리에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Melton Jr. nasceu em 1640, em Isle of Wight, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Berwick Melton Jr, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Wallingston, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Ann Hopwood em 1670, em Charles City, Charles City County, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 8 de março de 1737, em Surry, Surry, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 97 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Melton Jr. родился в 1640 г. в местности исл оф ваит, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas Berwick Melton Jr было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Hannah Wallingston, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Ann Hopwood в 1670 г. в местности чарльс сити, чарльс сити коунти, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 8 марта 1737 г. в местности сурри, сурри, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 97 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Melton Jr. nació en 1640, en Isle of Wight, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Berwick Melton Jr, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Hannah Wallingston, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Mary Ann Hopwood en 1670, en Charles City, Charles City County, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Murió el 8 de marzo de 1737, en Surry, Surry, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 97 años.
